title: Rearing spider

The '''rearing spider''', also known as the '''giant cave spider''', was a large arachnid native to [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] that got its name from its way of intimidation and attacking, standing on its rear and encompassing its prey with all of its legs. Unlike most spiders, the rearing spider would hunt its prey instead of capturing them in webbing, and it has six legs instead of eight. It could usually be found in desert caves or scavenging the rotten meat left by a [[Gorax/Legends|Gorax]]. They were sometimes preyed upon by [[Condor dragon/Legends|condor dragons]].

==History==
[[File:Condordragons-woswfg.jpg|thumb|left|210px|A rearing spider becomes a [[Condor dragon/Legends|condor dragon]] family's prey.]]
In approximately [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], a caravan in search of two [[Human/Legends|Human]] children's missing parents came to the cave fortress of their kidnapper, a [[Gorax/Legends|Gorax]], in the [[Desert of Salma/Legends|Desert of Salma]].

Inside the Gorax's cavernous lair they encountered several rearing spiders. A baby one tries to attack them as they cross a large web stretching across a bottomless pit, but Mace stabs the spider with a knife, causing it to fall into the pit.

A giant one attacked [[Deej Warrick|Deej]], who was the last one to cross. The [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] priestess [[Kaink/Legends|Kaink]] used her magic scepter to momentarily hypnotize it while Deej made it safely across. Just as the spider came out of its hypnotic trance, the Ewok [[Chukha-Trok/Legends|Chukha-Trok]] cut a main anchoring strand of the large web the spider was on with his axe. The spider plunged into a deep crevice, screeching to its death.

During this encounter, another rearing spider was speared in its soft underside by the Ewok [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket W. Warrick]], as it tried to attack him, [[Cindel Towani|Cindel]], and [[Widdle Warrick/Legends|Widdle]].
